name: P-3 eval-history records per-record grading (grade and token counts) per the architecture
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && printf '{"id":"r1","input":"x","expected":"y"}\n' > evals/datasets/agents/test-agent.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" test-agent --version 1.0.0 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'grade' prompts/eval-history/test-agent/1.0.0.json && grep -q 'tokens' prompts/eval-history/test-agent/1.0.0.json && echo per_record 1>&2
